Draft:Amos Le Blanc.clean_draft_note: Prepared 2026-06-13. All YouTube, Vimeo, IMVDb, self-published sources removed. 21 reliable sources remain. Cannot be pushed to Wikipedia due to account block.

monitored_candidates.notability_assessment: STRONG CANDIDATE. Jazz pianist born 1997 in Columbus, Ohio. Juilliard MFA 2020 (Jerome L. Greene Fellowship). DownBeat named him one of 25 for the Future in 2024. NYC Jazz Records: Up-and-Comer of the Year 2024 and Best International Artist of the Year. Jazz Gallery Commission Residency 2022-2023. Roulette Commission 2023-2024. Long tenure with Immanuel Wilkins Quartet (Wilkins has a Wikipedia article). Five albums as a leader; sixth album Lucid released June 19, 2026. DownBeat is a reliable Wikipedia source. Account block prevents action.
monitored_candidates.recommended_action: Human editor with no COI should draft article once additional mainstream press coverage is confirmed. DownBeat recognition alone may be sufficient given WP:MUSIC criteria for jazz.

session_summary_2026-06-21.new_finding: Micah Thomas has no Wikipedia article. Strong notability case. Flagged high-priority.
